title: nepeta podostachys var. paulsenii
intro: Nepeta podostachys var. paulsenii, also known as Himalayan catmint, is a lesser-known species of the Nepeta genus, a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Himalayan catmint include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
